# hidDescriptorLengthLo

**Instance Property**

The low byte length of the descriptor.

## Declaration

```swift
uint8_t hidDescriptorLengthLo;
```

## Getting the Properties

- **hidDescriptorType**: The type of the descriptor.
- **hidDescriptorLengthHi**: The high byte length of the descriptor.
